hint: First invert each input: A' = NAND(A,A), B' = NAND(B,B). Then NAND(A',B') = (A'·B')' = A+B by De Morgan's theorem.
title: OR from NAND
objective: Build OR gate using only NAND gates
description: Complete the NAND universality series! You've built NOT and AND from NAND — now prove you can also build OR. By De Morgan's law, OR(A,B) = NAND(NOT A, NOT B).
